name: BitSummit 2026
description: Established in late-2012, BitSummit was founded with the goal of giving Japanese independent game makers a chance to show their games to the world, and we succeeded, growing from a small, industry-only event for around 200 people in 2013, to a groundbreaking festival that held court to over 11,000 people in 2018.
short_description: Japan's premier independent games festival, showcasing indie games from across the world.
